Name: Geothermal Development Company
Description: The Geothermal Development Company Limited (GDC) is a 100% government-owned State Corporation operating under the Ministry of Energy and Petroleum. It was created as a special purpose company to accelerate the development of geothermal resources in Kenya. Our core activities include exploration, drilling, assessing and development of geothermal resources for power generation and other alternative uses.

Name: Supreme Energy
Description: Supreme Energy Group of Companies (SEML/SERD/SERB), a growing Multinational Energy Companies with its core business on renewable energy Geothermal Power Plant.

Name: Eavor Technologies Inc.
Description:
Eavor is an Alberta-based tech company that has invented a new geothermal power generation technology that overcomes all the traditional roadblocks of geothermal. We call this new highly effective green power generation system Eavor-Loop. Our system is made with existing commercial componentry configured in a completely novel way. We use the most recent advances in drilling techniques and merge them with the latest heat to power generation technology to create the world’s first scalable, steady, and reliable source of green power.

This is 'Energy for Eavor'.

Name: Quaise Energy
Description:
Quaise develops superhot geothermal power plants for a terawatt-scale world. Our unique millimeter wave drilling system can build geothermal wells at unprecedented temperatures and depths, unlocking energy security and independence for every nation.

By targeting temperatures of 300-500 degrees Celsius at depths of 3-20 kilometers, we can build power generation and heat distribution plants within a short distance of every major population and industrial center on the planet.

We can even achieve the terawatt-level annual deployments required to meet accelerating global energy demand by scaling through the fossil fuel industry's established supply chain and workforce. There is no other energy solution capable of the same scale and speed.

Name: International Geothermal Association
Description: We connect the Global Geothermal Community, serving as a platform for networking opportunities aimed at promoting and supporting global geothermal development. We run the flagship event called the World Geothermal Congress every three years and many regional events on a yearly basis putting the spotlight on policies, the regulatory framework, financial mechanisms and tech development. We are building the geothermal eco-system to serve Sustainable Development Goal #7: clean and affordable energy for all.

Name: Sage Geosystems
Description:
Sage Geosystems is pioneering Pressure Geothermal—a new category of geothermal energy that delivers grid-scale power and long-duration energy storage virtually anywhere.

Our patented technologies harness both heat and pressure from the Earth, enabling breakthrough performance in power generation and energy storage at a cost and speed unmatched by conventional geothermal or battery systems. From powering data centers to replacing coal plants, our systems are compact, modular, and commercially viable today.

Sage has already commissioned a 3MW energy storage facility, secured major contracts with Meta, the Department of Defense, and top utilities, and is backed by leading energy operators and venture funds.

Name: International Geothermal Association
Description: We connect the Global Geothermal Community, serving as a platform for networking opportunities aimed at promoting and supporting global geothermal development. We run the flagship event called the World Geothermal Congress every three years and many regional events on a yearly basis putting the spotlight on policies, the regulatory framework, financial mechanisms and tech development. We are building the geothermal eco-system to serve Sustainable Development Goal #7: clean and affordable energy for all.

Name: KS Orka Renewables Pte. Ltd.
Description:
KS Orka Renewables is one of the most ambitious geothermal developers in the world. The projects are led by geothermal and power project developer experts with over 30 years of experience in some of the world's most significant geothermal development projects. 
 
We aim to deliver geothermal power in a clean, safe and responsible way for the benefit of the all individuals by applying KS Orka's inovative incremental business model and technology to develop and accelerate geothermal power projects, with a target of producing up to 1,000MW by 2026. 

Visit our website www.ksorka.com to learn more about KS Orka.

Name: Geothermal Development Company - CeraPhi Energy
Description:
CeraPhi Energy is a leading project development company delivering global geothermal energy solutions at scale.

Our patented CeraPhiWell system unlocks deep geothermal energy through both repurposed oil and gas wells and newly drilled wells, supported by our in-house drilling experts. This approach reduces project risk, shortens delivery times, and ensures cost-effective access to reliable, sustainable heat.

We provide practical, future-ready solutions for the decarbonisation of heat across a wide range of sectors—including NHS facilities, universities, leisure centres, industrial estates, large housing developments and agriculture.

CeraPhi enables long-term, base-load heat delivery that supports district heating, low-carbon infrastructure planning, and sustainable estate management—helping organisations meet climate targets while maintaining operational resilience and fluctuating energy costs.

CeraPhi Energy delivers reliable, available, baseload thermal energy anywhere, everywhere.

Contact us to explore how our proven system can support your net-zero journey.

Name: GreenFire Energy Inc
Description:
About GreenFire Energy
GreenFire Energy delivers advanced geothermal solutions designed to maximize the productivity of underutilized geothermal fields, expand operational capacity, and unlock the potential of new geothermal sites. Focused on providing continuous, resilient, and scalable baseload power, GreenFire’s innovative systems address today’s urgent need for energy assurance in a sustainable manner. By revitalizing existing geothermal assets and partnering with industry leaders like Baker Hughes, H&P, Vallourec, and top geothermal producers, GreenFire is committed to pioneering the geothermal sector’s role in the global energy transition. With 22 international patents and a mission to make geothermal energy accessible and impactful, GreenFire Energy is redefining renewable power for the industries that need it most.

Name: Philippine Geothermal Production Company, Inc. (PGPC)
Description: The Philippine Geothermal Production Company, Inc. (PGPC) is a 100% Filipino corporation operating the Tiwi and Mak-Ban geothermal steam fields and is committed to operating in a manner that puts premium on the safety, security and well-being of its employees, the environment, and its host communities. PGPC is also committed to harness our country’s geothermal resources in a sustainable and efficient manner to provide clean, reliable, and renewable geothermal energy.

Name: XGS Energy
Description: XGS Energy is a geothermal energy company founded and headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.  Our proprietary heat harvesting technology and closed-loop well architecture enable global deployment of terawatt-scale geothermal heat and power.

Name: GMK Energy
Description: GMK Energy is a world leader consulting, engineering and project development company which gives engineering, project design, consultancy, owner's engineering and integrated reservoir&well services in global geothermal energy market for power plant, district heating, greenhouse etc.

Name: Eavor Deutschland
Description: Eavor-Loop ist ein geothermisches System zur erneuerbaren Energieerzeugung und kann fast überall in Deutschland zuverlässig Energie für Fernwärmenetze und Strom liefern. Eavor-Loop ist seismisch sicher und skalierbar. Eavor-Loop hat das Potenzial, zum Gamechanger der Energie- und Wärmewende in Deutschland zu werden.

Name: DEEP Earth Energy Production
Description: DEEP Earth Energy Production is developing geothermal resources to meet increasing energy needs with sustainable, clean and renewable energy

Name: Criterion Energy Partners
Description: Criterion Energy Partners (CEP) is an independent exploration and production company focused on developing decentralized direct geothermal energy projects to help commercial and industrial consumers reduce their emissions and improve their operating efficiency by providing clean, reliable, always on energy using heat from the Earth.

Name: Gradient Geothermal
Description: Gradient Geothermal is revolutionizing the energy landscape by harnessing geothermal heat from existing oil and gas wells to generate emissions-free power. We specialize in innovative geothermal solutions that align with a sustainable, low-carbon future. By integrating advanced technology and industry expertise, we empower clients to maximize the value of their thermal resources while reducing their environmental footprint.

Name: TLS Geothermics
Description:
TLS Geothermics is a geoscience tech company, exploring and developing geothermal projects for power, heat, cold and byproducts. We conduct exploration projects globally, with 10 years of R&D activities to significantly reduce upstream drilling risks (geology, geophysics). We implement geothermal power systems independently and in partnership. We operate field campaigns for geological and geophysical data acquisition, with support from renowned laboratories and experts. Offering a complete acquisition / processing / interpretation value chain and expertise in geoscience studies, basin analysis, economics and technical feasibility in geothermal energy.

TLS Geothermics est une société technologique des géosciences, explorateur et développeur de projets en géothermie profonde, pour la production de chaleur et d'électricité.
L'entreprise mène des projets d'exploration en France et des activités R&D visant à réduire significativement les risques en amont des forages (géologie, géophysique) et met en œuvre des projets de centrales géothermiques par une approche globale seul ou en partenariat.
Nous mettons en oeuvre nous-même sur le terrain des campagnes d'acquisitions de données géologiques et géophysiques (MT, gravimétrie, sismique passive) et cela toujours avec un appui de laboratoires et experts parmi les plus reconnus dans les techniques utilisées.
TLS Geothermics dispose d'une chaîne complète d'acquisition/traitement/interprétation, et propose à ses clients et partenaires son expertise : études géosciences, expertise bassins, études économiques et financières, faisabilité technique en géothermie, préparation des projets d'exploration en géothermie.

Name: Ross Energy
Description:
The operator’s operator and the engineer’s engineer 
Ross Energy is specialized in well management. We provide a total life-cycle service from project inception through design and engineering to drilling and supervising wells. We oversee the planning and development of subsurface projects and execute the design, construction, completion, testing and operation of geothermal, wind logistics, CCS and oil and gas wells.  
Drawing on know-how of the practical aspects of drilling including logistics, site planning,  and applications and permitting, we supply customers with in-depth knowledge of the process flow, ensuring efficient execution of well projects and the optimal solutions for energy companies.  By drawing on decades of expertise from the oil and gas industry to de-risking and maturing geothermal and CCS projects, we ensure safe, accurate processes and a better utilization of resources – not only benefiting drilling operations, but all of us in the long run. 

Ross Energy’s mission is to elevate the green energy transition through knowledge, experience and long-term partnerships

Name: Steam
Description:
Steam is one of the world's leading geothermal consulting and engineering companies.

Founded in Italy in 1987, we provide geothermal developers with integrated Owner's Technical Advisory teams composed of geoscience, geothermal resource, surface engineering, environmental and business case experts. Together, we guide design and decision-making throughout the whole project lifecycle, effectively de-risking projects and maximizing shareholder returns.

With references in over 30 countries in the last decade and a portfolio of geothermal assignments totaling nearly 1 GW, we support our clients in every stage of the project timeline: Preliminary Studies; Surface and Deep Exploration; Engineering, Construction and Commissioning; and Operations.

To schedule a consultation, please write to us at info@steam-group.net.

Name: CORE Knowledge
Description: CORE Knowledge is a podcast that exists to engage the geothermal, O&G, policy making and investment communities in order to collaborate and unlock the immense potential that is geothermal energy.

Name: Exceed Geo Energy
Description:
Exceed Geo Energy is a privately held clean energy company redefining what’s possible with geothermal. We develop and operate carbon-negative geothermal systems using our proprietary Infinity Loop technology—unlocking scalable, dispatchable clean power with dramatically lower water and land footprints.

With proven expertise in high-temperature, high-pressure drilling, Exceed delivers projects from development to operations across key markets. Our systems are designed to scale globally—bringing true baseload renewables to regions traditionally left out of the clean energy transition.

We’re not just innovating geothermal—we’re building a category.

Name: E2E Energy Solutions Inc.
Description:
ECONOMICALLY VIABLE, GEOTHERMAL ENERGY SOLUTIONS

E2E Energy Solutions is at the forefront of sustainable energy innovation, specializing in cost-effective and eco-friendly geothermal technologies. Leveraging its patented Enhanced Geothermal Reservoir Recovery System (EGRRS), E2E enables access to geothermal energy in areas previously considered non-viable. 

With a steadfast commitment to a net-zero carbon future, E2E designs and develops advanced geothermal heat and power generation solutions. In the short term, the company is focused on showcasing its groundbreaking subterranean enhancement technology. Long-term, E2E aims to commercialize these solutions through licensing, providing a scalable pathway for widespread adoption.

E2E’s innovative approach allows energy producers to economically tap into hidden geothermal resources, presenting an impactful solution to meet future energy demands while reducing greenhouse gas emissions. By pioneering advancements in geothermal energy, E2E Energy Solutions is empowering industries and communities to transition to sustainable power systems, playing a vital role in achieving global climate goals. Guided by innovation, efficiency, and sustainability, E2E is committed to shaping the future of energy for generations to come.

Name: TownRock Energy
Description:
We are an award-winning geothermal company based in Edinburgh, Scotland and a leading specialist in all aspects of the UK’s geothermal resources. 

We help our clients to understand the facts about the low-carbon heating technologies available to them. The advice we provide is bespoke to your site, and is tailored to address your heating and cooling demand requirements, and help you meet your net-zero and sustainability targets.

We specialise in the valuation, development and operation of net-zero heating and cooling projects using flooded coal mines, hot sedimentary aquifers (HSA’s), granites (Hot Dry Rocks), open and closed-loop ground-source heat pumps, district heating integration and thermal energy storage. 

Our mission is to access the abundant geothermal energy of the earth’s subsurface to provide zero-carbon renewable heating and cooling to industrial, commercial and domestic energy users.

Geothermal energy technology is a relatively new path to unlocking clean energy in the UK and is often poorly appreciated or understood. Our small, dedicated team prides itself in taking a clear and strategic approach to assisting clients and partners to understand and realise the value of the geological asset beneath their site.

Name: Tanzania Geothermal Development Company Limited
Description: Vision: To be the most competitive regional geothermal resources development company serving today and future generations with reliable, affordable and environmentally friendly energy.

Name: Borealis Geothermal
Description:
Borealis is the Canadian Leader in the understanding of convective fracture controlled geothermal systems. Founded in 2007, Borealis is a private company whose sole focus has been to advance development of Canadian geothermal projects.

For over 15 years, Borealis has explored for or consulted on a wide variety of geothermal projects across Canada. We are conversant with all the relevant geologies and play types that can be expected within the Canadian context. Further, on the surface, we have created unique risk-reducing designs for a variety of geothermal applications, that deliver superior throughput at reduced costs.

We’ve spent considerable time advancing the art of geothermal exploration and overcoming the challenges that are inherent in developing both hard rock and sedimentary geothermal reservoirs. We’ve won multiple awards for our geothermal technical advances and have a long list of Canadian “Firsts”. We’ve had the advantage of being able to trial our own ideas at our M’deek (Fuel for Reconciliation) and Valemount (Sustainaville) projects.

Borealis has both developed and enjoys a wide network of specialized geothermal technical support, with multiple University collaborations, direct access to global subject matter experts, and strong ties to local service providers. 

Our deployment of geophysical and geochemical techniques include:
· Gravity
· Magnetics/electromagnetic
· Passive/active seismic
· Magnetotellurics
· Water/Soil/Bio/Rock geochemistry
· Gas sampling
· Heat flux
· Thermal gradients
· Petrographic analysis

These activities have enabled our economic analysis, where we have developed a wide range of models to evaluate the economic value, and risk, related to geothermal projects and/or any one component of those projects.

As consultants and company owners, we practice effective frugality and treat your funds like they are our own. We are creative collaborators who use our business as a force for good to realize your project vision.

Name: Enerjeo Kemaliye Enerji Üretim A.Ş.
Description:
Enerji sektöründe temel amaç, artan nüfusun ve gelişen ekonominin ihtiyaçlarının sürekli ve kesintisiz olarak karşılanabilmesidir. Hizmet sunduğu her alanda olduğu gibi elektrik enerjisi üretiminde de yenilikçi ve öncü bir şirket anlayışını ilke edinen Enerji Holding yatırımlarını yenilenebilir enerji sektörüne yönlendirerek 2011 yılında Enerjeo A.Ş. yi kurmuştur.
Jeotermal enerji üretimi konusunda sektörde yer alan diğer firmalardan farklı bir strateji izleyen Enerjeo A.Ş., jeotermal sahanın keşfinden enerji üretimine kadar tüm basamakları şirket içerisinde entegre bir şekilde gerçekleştirerek bu alanda bir ilke imza atmayı başarmıştır.
Manisa ili Alaşehir İlçesi sınırlarında yer alan Kemaliye kasabasında çalışmalarına başlayan Enerjeo A.Ş. 2011 yılında bu sahanın işletme ruhsatını almıştır. Jeotermal arama ve sondaj aşamalarının öneminin bilincinde olarak ilerlemiş, şirket prensipleri doğrultusunda bu faaliyetleri hızlı, doğru ve güvenilir bir şekilde yürütmek amacıyla 'Enerji Holding Jeofizik Servisi' ve 'Enerji Holding Sondaj Servisi' birimlerini kurmuştur.
2013 yılı ortalarında deneyimli mühendis kadrosu ve son teknoloji ekipmanları ile çalışmalarına başlayan Enerji Holding Jeofizik Servisi, Kemaliye sahasında MT ölçüleri alarak, veri-işlem ve 3-D modelleme aşamalarını tamamlamış, sahayı jeolojik olarak yorumlayarak en uygun sondaj lokasyonlarını belirlemiştir. Sonrasında Enerji Holding Sondaj Servisi tarafından üretim kuyuları açılmaya başlanmış ve başarılı sonuçlar elde edilmiştir.
Enerjeo Kemaliye Enerji Üretim A.Ş.' nin 2015 yılının ikinci yarısında 25 MW/s kapasiteli jeotermal elektrik santrali ile elektrik üretimine başlaması planlanmaktadır.

Name: Gaia Energy
Description:
Discover Sustainable Energy Solutions with GAIA Energy

At GAIA Energy, we’re proud to lead the way in realizing innovative geothermal projects across the Netherlands. Our solutions deliver reliable, eco-friendly heat to residential neighborhoods, greenhouse horticulture, industries, and more.

From concept to completion, we partner closely with local stakeholders to navigate every step of the journey—from initial preparation and project realization to ongoing production and maintenance. With GAIA Energy, you gain more than just a provider—you gain a trusted partner in sustainable energy.

GAIA Energy: Empowering Communities with Geothermal Innovation.

Name: Swiss Geo Energy
Description:
Exploration, Production and Development of Geothermal Resources. 
Water Resources Management. 
Energy Transition solutions.

Name: Baseload Power US
Description:
The U.S. leads the world in geothermal power generation, yet this accounts for less than 1% of the country's total power production. Amidst the intensifying effects of climate change, states like California and Nevada have pledged to get 100% of their power from renewable energy by 2045 and 2050 respectively. 
 
Baseload Power U.S. aims to play an important part in meeting these goals. By building small-scale, zero-emissions binary power plants fueled by geothermal fluids, we have an incredible opportunity to develop this massive yet untapped renewable energy source.

So far we have one plant in operation and a second one on the way. We also have several land leases in Nevada, where we are actively are looking for new opportunities. In addition, we have signed a LOI to develop a pilot project together with Chevron Technology Ventures to advance lower-carbon energy production in the Oil and Gas industry.

Name: Mazama Energy
Description: Mazama Energy’s mission is to drive human progress by delivering large-scale, clean geothermal power from Superhot Rocks (SHR). Mazama Energy brings together geothermal expertise and oil and gas engineering knowhow to design robust Engineered Geothermal Systems (EGS) to harness the immense potential of SHR.  Mazama Energy’s strong team, deep knowledge base, extensive IP, and robust technology portfolio can redefine geothermal energy to be global and cost competitive with fossil fuels.

Name: Transmark Renewables
Description:
Transmark Renewables is an independent power producer (IPP) and geothermal exploration and development company within the Transmark Group. Transmark Renewables has built a very strong and integrated geothermal platform, supported by:

    Transmark Renewables' project management & financial structuring expertise;
    Transmark Renewables' experience in geosciences
    Transmark Renewables' drilling management capabilities; and
    the Transmark Group's (financial) resources.

Transmark Renewables is becoming a significant player in the geothermal market and aims to contribute to the acceleration of the installed geothermal capacity all over the world. Transmark Renewables will focus on the establishment of a global platform of geothermal projects, either through partnerships with local developers or through greenfield development.

Transmark Renewables has a dedicated team fully focussed on the global exploration and development of geothermal energy resources.

Name: MAADURGA THERMAL POWER COMPANY LIMITED
Description: Maadurga Thermal Power Company Limited is a 60MW Independent Power Plant located at Cuttack, Orissa. Maadurga Thermal Power Company Limited is promoted by The United Group of Companies with its headquarters in Jamshedpur. The plant got commissioned in July, 2024. The vision is to become one of the leading and sustainable power producer in the nation.

Name: Geothermal Energy Network
Description: Building a network of energy experts in the geothermal energy and ground source heat pump space, covering subsurface geology, drilling, wells, equipment and topside innovation making geothermal the baseload renewable energy of choice anywhere and everywhere.

Name: Clúster de Geotermia Colombia
Description:
El Clúster de Geotermia Colombia es una entidad privada sin ánimo de lucro, cuyo objetivo principal es promover el desarrollo sostenible e innovador del recurso geotérmico en Colombia para la generación de energía eléctrica y sus usos directos, fomentando la colaboración entre actores, impulsando la transición energética y posicionando al país como líder en energía geotérmica en Latinoamérica. 

Como asociación, buscamos generar las condiciones de orden legal, regulatorio, técnico, económico y social que habiliten el desarrollo y consolidación de la geotermia como fuente de energía renovable capaz de contribuir a una economía verde y resiliente, mientras fortalece la competitividad del sector, apoya la innovación tecnológica y fortalece la responsabilidad social y ambiental en los proyectos geotérmicos.

 Aportamos conocimiento técnico y estratégico.
  Facilitamos alianzas público-privadas.
  Apoyamos estudios, proyectos piloto y políticas públicas.
  Promovemos una visión sostenible, regional y con impacto global.

Name: Baseload Power Iceland
Description:
While Iceland started harnessing geothermal energy in the beginning of the 20th century, Icelanders had used natural geothermal springs for bathing and washing for centuries. In 1908 the geothermal hot water began to be harnessed for heating individual homes, and today Iceland is one of the leading geothermal power generating countries in the world, accounting for 30% of the country's total power production, and 98% of residential and industrial heating. 
Due to its low-cost green electricity and reliable transmission system, Iceland is an attractive location for industries, creating intriguing opportunities for the Icelandic power sector. 
Numerous geothermal options remain unharnessed, which sets Iceland in a rare position in our energy-constrained world. The major power producers in Iceland are now able to offer green electricity at very competitive prices – around 50% lower than electricity costs in Western Europe.
Baseload Power aims to play an important part in meeting these opportunities. By building small-scale, zero-emissions binary power plants fueled by geothermal fluids, we have an incredible opportunity to develop this massive yet untapped renewable energy source.

Name: Eastland Generation
Description:
The Eastland Generation business includes geothermal, hydro electricity generation plants and solar projects. Our focus is on building strong, long-term, mutually beneficial relationships from the ground up — together with the owners of the land the plants operate on.

We power a realisation of value to our land owner partners and deliver a resource that wouldn’t otherwise be available.

Name: Aetna Geothermal
Description:
Aetna Geothermal offers comprehensive geological services to the geothermal industry and associated lithium brine extraction, from surface exploration to the drilling of deep wells. We are dedicated to providing expert support throughout every stage of a project's lifecycle, for large and small scale projects for direct-use of power generation applications.  

We use the latest software and technologies to create high-quality graphics and 3D models, helping our clients gain a thorough understanding of their   resources. 

Our team of geothermal experts, in partnership with renowned international partners, bring a wealth of experience in geothermal and lithium brine projects to guarantee the best results.

By choosing Aetna Geothermal, you can trust that your project will benefit from our extensive knowledge and international experience in the field of geothermal energy.

Thank you for your interest in Aetna Geothermal.

Name: Italian Geothermal Forum
Description: The Italian Geothermal Forum is the annual event aimed at exploring current sector developments and fostering international discussion on the potential and opportunities for geothermal energy use in a professional and impartial way. The program includes plenary sessions focused on dialogue between Italy and Europe, aiming to deepen the understanding of current and future market scenarios. The discussions will also involve representatives from national and regional institutions. Additionally, parallel technical sessions are planned, dedicated to low, medium, and high enthalpy geothermal energy, district heating and cooling, heat pumps, geothermal heat for industry, and strategic minerals from geothermal brines. Networking opportunities, media meetings, and the presence of research organizations and Italian and international associations will enhance the participants' experience.

Name: Open Mountain Energy
Description: Open Mountain Energy combines its geothermal and project development expertise with Kaishan Group's power plant technologies and manufacturing to form a cutting-edge industry leading vertically integrated geothermal energy company.

Name: Australian Geothermal Association
Description:
The Australian Geothermal Association (AGA) was formed in 2016 to promote and encourage the science, technology and development of geothermal energy in Australia, and is affiliated with the International Geothermal Association (IGA).

The Board of Directors consists of:

President - Mark Ballesteros
Director - Graeme Beardsmore
Director - Trey Meckel
Director - Rosalind Archer
Secretary - Zoe Stackhouse
Treasurer - Jorik Poesse

Charles Davidson is the Chairman of the Hot Springs Special Interest Group.  AGA does not have any employees. 

AGA is a professional society whose members are individuals working in the industry, academia and government, with experiences covering the full range of geothermal applications from ground source heat pumps to direct industrial heat supply, recreational bathing and wellness, and electrical power generation.

We are the central point for information on all things geothermal. 

In saying that, the views and opinions of individual AGA members are their own and not those of AGA or its whole membership. 

AGA also does not support or endorse any particular supplier or technology used or supplied by any member or organisation.

All publications on Australian geothermal sector produced by AGA are accessible on our website at www.australiangeothermal.org.au. 

Contact AGA via email: info@australiangeothermal.org.au

Name: ZeroGeo Energy GmbH
Description:
We are a leading European Renewable, Low Carbon Geothermal Energy company delivering delivering Energy From Rocks.

Our strategy is to: 

- Develop geothermal baseload heat and electricity projects by deploying geothermal Hot Dry Rock (HDR) Technology.

- Increase the recovery of natural resources and improve the economics of resource recovery with minimal environmental impact by deploying the latest reservoir stimulation technologies.

- Provide project management services to the natural resources and renewable energy industries.

We are currently implementing this strategy through: 

- Renewable Low Carbon Geothermal Energy Generation with Hot Dry Rock Technologies.

- Collaboration with Eden GeoPower Inc. on deploying its Electrical Reservoir Stimulation technology in geothermal and geologic hydrogen projects in Europe.

We do this by:

- Leveraging our past expertise and experience in capital-intensive oil and gas projects;

- Building synergies with our strategic partners; and  

- Deploying the latest developments in geothermal and reservoir stimulation technologies. 

Our greenhouse gas emissions will be certified in accordance with the Greenhouse Gas Protocols and our Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) polices are fully aligned with the UN Sustainable Development Goals.

#energyfromrocks #geothermalenergy #geothermalstorage

Name: Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal
Description:
Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal is in the early stages of development with the goal of providing up to 7-15MW of clean, geothermal electricity in Northeastern BC.  Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal is poised to be British Columbia's first geothermal electricity facility and amongst the first in Canada. The site will host a binary system using an Organic Rankine Cycle power plant given the low-grade geothermal resource. 

 
Tu Deh-Kah Geothermal is 100% Fort Nelson First Nation community-owned through our economic development corporation, Deh Tai LP. This project aligns with the Province of BC's and Government of Canada's climate targets to achieve net-zero. Fort Nelson's electricity grid is currently 100% reliant on fossil fuels—this geothermal project is an essential keystone in Northeastern BC's energy transition.

 
There has been a significant economic downturn in the region due to a dwindling gas and forestry industry. There is a cascading system of opportunities in utilizing the excess heat from the system. This emerging renewable energy industry in Canada brings stable long-term jobs to the Northern Rockies by establishing the region as a geothermal hub.

Name: FRI-EL GEO S.r.l.
Description: FRI-EL GEO si è specializzata nella ricerca e sviluppo, progettazione e costruzione di centrali geotermoelettriche e la vendita e distribuzione di energia elettrica e calore da essi derivati.

Name: 4th Resource Corp
Description: 4th Resource Corporation is a Canadian energy company focused on exploring for and developing geothermal energy projects that lift up the surrounding economies in a safe and environmentally responsible manner. 4th Resource was born out of oil and gas exploration by those professionals who, through decades of experience, honed their skills developing energy projects around the world but saw missed opportunities and energy development synergies that the current generation of energy companies did not. By combining this know-how with local and domestic geothermal expertise, 4th Resource’s approach to energy development results in a sum greater than the parts.

Name: Maspo Energy (Gürmen Group)
Description:
Türkiye’nin jeotermal kaynak açısından en aktif bölgelerinden birinde yer alan ruhsatlı sahamız, 12,650 km2’lik genişliğiyle Türkiye’deki en büyük jeotermal sahası olma özelliğine sahiptir.

Maspo Enerji toplam kurulu gücü, %100  yenilenebilir enerji gücüne dayanmaktadır. Çevreye verdiği önem ve duyarlılık esas alınmıştır.

Maspo Enerji, ruhsat sahasının potansiyelinin en doğru şekilde değerlendirilmesi ve sürdürebilir elektrik üretiminin temini için sahada; Jeolojik, jeokimya ve jeofizik araştırmaları, hidrotermal alterasyon çalışmalarının yanı sıra Türkiye’de ilk olarak uzun dönemli etkileşim ve izleyici (tracer) testleri gerçekleştirmiştir.

Maspo Enerji, 2010 yılında başladığı jeotermal enerji yatırmlarına  ALA-1 JES  10 MW lık yatırımı tamamlayarak, tesisi 03.06.2017 tarihinde T.C. Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanlığı tarafından geçici kabulü yapılarak işletmeye almıştır.

MASPO Enerji A.Ş.’nin Manisa Alaşehir’de Türkiye’nin en büyük ilk 10 jeotermal santrali arasında yerini alan 30 MW gücündeki ALA-2 jeotermal enerji santralinin T.C. Enerji ve Tabii Kaynaklar Bakanlığı tarafından geçici kabulü yapılarak 27 Eylül 2019’da işletmeye almıştır.

Ala-2 Jeotermal Enerji Santralinde Yönlü Sondaj Teknikleri kullanılmış, Tarım arazilerinde efektif tasarruf sağlanarak, 30 MW santral minumum bir alana yerleştirilmiştir.

Yenilenebilir enerjide güncel olarak yıllık 40 MW’lık üretime sahip olan ve toplamda 140 MW’lık kapasiteye ulaşmayı hedefleyen Maspo Enerji A.Ş., Aynı zamanda dünya yenilenebilir enerji ligi olarak adlandırılan RE100 platformuna da kabul edilerek Türkiye’de bir ilki gerçekleştirmiştir.


Jeotermal santrallerde enerji verimliliğini artırmak ve dışa bağımlılığı azaltmak üzere Türkiye’nin ilk JES AR-GE Merkezini kurmuştur.

Geotermia Polska inwestuje kapitał w najbardziej perspektywiczne lokalizacje, budujemy ciepłownie geotermalne i ogrzewamy naszych odbiorców zieloną energią.

Name: GTO Technologies Inc.
Description:
GTO Technologies is committed to developing and commercializing innovations that unlock the full potential of carbon-free electricity. Our mission is to address critical technological challenges that hinder the economic growth of advanced geothermal, geologic hydrogen and critical minerals solutions. We aim to transform these technologies from concept to market, enabling the world to harness clean, carbon-free energy.

Our key technologies make Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS) cost-effective by first creating a massive subsurface heat exchanger with a matrix of fractures connecting horizontal wells but also provides the technology for controlling flow in those fractures. Our patented Generation 2 systems, developed with the lessons learned from a $5.3 million DOE FORGE grant and further development and testing using a $5 million seed round, fix EGS problems like short circuits and early cooling. We create underground heat exchangers by providing the access points for fracture stimulation and then control the flow rate in each fracture. The GTO Technologies system can triple EGS power output and boost project profits by $800 million per project.  This technology also can be used to create systems for geologic hydrogen and critical minerals recovery.

Name: GDF Latin America
Description:
The objective of the Facility (GDF) is to encourage public and/or private investment in geothermal power development in Latin America. Funding is available for the following activities:

Geoscientific surface studies to determine the optimal location of reservoir-confirmation wells at the most promising geothermal prospects.
Drilling and testing of reservoir-confirmation wells at the most promising geothermal prospects to assist developers in securing financing for subsequent development phases.
GDF will provide financial support to assist in mitigating geothermal exploration risk. The GDF is the first multi-donor climate initiative to promote geothermal energy within Latin America. It is expected to improve access to equity or other funding sources for geothermal developers in the region, and to play a catalytic role in establishing geothermal energy as a strategic option in power-expansion planning within the participating countries.

Headquartered in Reno, Nevada, USA, we specialize in low-temperature power generation, deep direct-use (DDU) and 5th Generation District Energy (5G DES) design in the Reno-Tahoe region of northern Nevada and California.


A dedicated proponent of shallow low-temperature power generation and direct-utilization of geothermal energy specifically applied to data centers and cryptocurrency centers, Martin Geothermal is currently involved with projects leading to industrial developments of low-temperature (50-130°C) applications in the Reno-Tahoe region, as described in papers published with the Geothermal Rising Conference (GRC; Martin; 2021, 2022; posted below). Working with local, state, and federal government officials and organizations, Martin Geothermal is working to expedite local direct-use projects with the goal of helping to reduce our carbon footprint, including converting natural gas systems to geothermal energy networks. 


Questions about an idea for a geothermal project? Interested in applying geothermal energy to a current or upcoming data center or cryptocurrency center project? Name: VegaGeo 3.0
Description:
VegaGeo 3.0 was founded to meet the surging global demand for a clean, dependable base load (24/7) power source for data centers worldwide, remote energy users as well as the US power grid. VegaGeo 3.0 is a geothermal power generation company that uses a proprietary Enhanced Geothermal Systems (“EGS”) technological application to produce baseload (24/7), grid-scale power using the only completely green renewable power source that can be harvested from the Earth’s most prevalent granitic rocks. VegaGeo 3.0 provides a 25 MW superstation design that offers the ability to hyper scale in 25 MW increments to generate hundreds of megawatts of capacity per location. We have compiled a top tier team of oil and gas professionals with decades of industry experience in all fields within the energy value chain. We are applying tried and true technological advancements that have been refined in US shale plays and elsewhere over the past two and a half decades, combined with what the renewable industry has learned from geothermal 1.0 (hydrothermal) and 2.0 (EGS) to come together to provide the future of geothermal power production, VegaGeo 3.0.
 
What excites us most about this technology is its ability to enable data centers and other remote energy users to be co-located directly at the source of power. The real game-changer is placing power plants right next to where the energy is consumed. Avoiding the need for long-distance transmission lines and costly substations dramatically reducing complexity, time, and expense.

Description:

C’est ainsi qu’est née en 2014 la SPL SEER, société avec un actionnariat exclusivement public.
Fort de la réussite du premier forage implanté sur Grigny et des travaux réseaux, deux collectivités l’ont rejointe Sainte-Geneviève des Bois et Fleury-Mérogis, permettant ainsi le raccordement de la plus grande prison d’Europe à Fleury-Mérogis.
La SEER poursuit désormais la mise en œuvre du schéma directeur territorial pour les communes avoisinantes.

Name: London Geothermal Consortium
Description:
At London Geothermal, we position ourselves as an infrastructure-focused GreenTech startup. While we are still in the early stages, we are building a scalable organization that works with both public and private stakeholders through the ESCO model. Our focus includes geothermal heat networks, digital twin technologies, carbon credit trading, and micro-ORC systems. We operate with the agility and innovation of a startup, but with a long-term vision to scale into a full SME as we grow our project portfolio.

Our expertise spans Deep Geothermal (Hydrothermal, EGS, Doublets), Ground Source Heat Pumps (Open Loop, Closed Loop, Standing Columns), and Micro ORC technology for waste heat recovery. We provide end-to-end services, including:

Turn-key geothermal project development – Feasibility, design, drilling, and system integration

Name: GEOFIT Project EU
Description:
Developing tomorrow’s smart Geothermal Systems and construction processes. Co-financed by the European Commission under INEA’s Low Carbon Energy, Renewable Energy Technologies program.

GEOFIT is an integrated industrially driven action, funded by the H2020 programme and carried out by 24 partners across EU, aimed at deployment of cost effective enhanced geothermal systems (EGS) on energy efficient building retrofitting. 

This entails the development technical development of innovative EGS and its components, namely, non-standard heat exchanger configurations, a novel hybrid heat pump and electrically driven compression heat pump systems and suite of heating and cooling components to be integrated with the novel GSHP concepts, all specially designed to applied in energy efficient retrofitting projects. 

To make viable the novel EGS in energy efficient building retrofitting, a suite of tools and technologies is developed, including: low invasive risk assessment technologies, site-inspection and worksite building monitoring techniques (SHM), control systems for cost-effective and optimized EGS in operation phase and novel BIM-enabled dedicated tools for management of geothermal based retrofitting works (GEOBIM platform). 

Furthermore, the project is committed with the application of novel drilling techniques as the improved low invasive vertical drilling and trenchless technologies.

This project has received funding from the European Union’s H2020 Grant Agreement No. 792210

Name: De Boormeester bv
Description:
Geothermische boringen zijn waardevol omdat ze toegang bieden tot aardwarmte, een duurzame en milieuvriendelijke energiebron. Waarom geothermie?

1. Duurzaam en hernieuwbaar
Geothermische energie maakt gebruik van de warmte die van nature in de aarde aanwezig is. Deze warmtebron wordt constant aangevuld door radioactief verval in de aardkern, waardoor het een vrijwel onuitputtelijke energiebron is.

2. Lage uitstoot van broeikasgassen
Bij het opwekken van geothermische energie is de uitstoot van CO₂ en andere schadelijke gassen minimaal, vooral in vergelijking met fossiele brandstoffen.

3. Efficiëntie
Geothermische systemen werken zeer efficiënt, omdat ze zowel voor elektriciteitsopwekking als verwarming en koeling kunnen worden gebruikt. Dit maakt ze geschikt voor huizen, kantoren en zelfs industriële toepassingen.

4. Kleine landoppervlakte nodig
Geothermische installaties hebben een kleinere ecologische voetafdruk dan veel andere hernieuwbare energiebronnen zoals zonneparken of windmolenparken.

5. Betrouwbaarheid
Geothermische energie is een constante energiebron die niet afhankelijk is van weersomstandigheden, zoals wind of zon. Hierdoor levert het een stabiele energievoorziening.

6. Lage operationele kosten
Nadat de installatie eenmaal is aangelegd, zijn de operationele en onderhoudskosten relatief laag, omdat de energiebron zelf gratis is.
7. Geschikt voor diverse toepassingen

Geothermie kan worden gebruikt voor elektriciteitsopwekking in geothermische centrales, maar ook voor directe verwarming in stedelijke gebieden of kleinschalig gebruik zoals warmtepompen in woningen.

8. Lange levensduur
Geothermische installaties kunnen tientallen jaren meegaan, waardoor ze een langdurige bron van duurzame energie bieden.

These technologies allow for the extraction and distribution of geothermal energy on a level comparable to oil and gas; a level of energy production that far exceeds current geothermal technologies.  What is so awesome about this technology is that it allows for the transport of geothermal heat to existing power plants the same way that coal and oil is transported to power plants.  By implementing minimal retrofitting for geothermal power these existing power plants can be turning out base load power to millions of consumers.  Using existing power plants will reduce start-up costs significantly compared to existing geothermal technologies.  Currently renewable energy capability has stalled at 28% of worldwide production.  The world requires base load power from renewable energy in order to mitigate climate change.  The only source that can accomplish this endeavor is geothermal energy.  The only geothermal energy technology that can produce base load power at this level of production is American GeoPower. Name: SciCat Oil LLC
Description:
Technology for Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS)

SciCat Geo is a subsidiary of SciCat Oil LLC (or SciCat) founded in 2011 by Dr. Michael Shoemaker and is based in Houston, Texas.

SciCat is subsurface geophysical technology providing a seismic driven development solution for Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS) in sedimentary basins. 

SciCat has developed award winning 3-D seismic geomechanics technology that measures in-situ 3-D minimum horizontal stress which is the key rock parameter that governs hydraulic fracture stimulation of relatively tight geologic formations, not only for enhanced energy production, but for controlled fracture design and minimal environmental footprint. 

The novel technology and method is the recent recipient of the 2020 prestigious AAPG Levorsen Memorial Award for innovation in subsurface exploration. 

Changes in rock geomechanics and subsequent minimum stress define stimulated rock volume (SRV) and reservoir extent, which drives well performance and ultimate recovery of geothermal liquids, for unconventional Enhanced Geothermal Systems. 

For oil/gas and unconventional petroleum systems application, the novel technology has been successfully applied to the prolific Midland and Delaware sub-basins of the greater Permian Basin, the results of which have been peer-reviewed and published.

Name: GEOFLEXheat
Description: The GEOFLEXheat project aims to revolutionize the European geothermal energy sector by introducing an innovative suite of technologies to enhance the extraction, efficiency and application of geothermal heat across diverse industrial sectors. This initiative is driven by a consortium that synergizes leading research institutions, SMEs, and industry experts to tackle the challenges of scalability, integration, and social acceptance associated with geothermal systems. At the core of project lies the development of a Heat Pipe Heat Exchanger coupled with an advanced Scaling Reactor to improve heat recovery from geothermal brine while simultaneously providing valuable mineral byproducts. This is complemented by a novel High-Temperature Heat Pump that delivers cost-effective and high-temperature heat, crucial for a wide range of industrial processes and beyond. The project will also deliver a state-of-the-art Control Strategy and Digital Twin, optimizing system performance and enabling real-time management of geothermal plants. Through comprehensive simulation and modelling, the project will showcase the full potential of geothermal energy to provide stable, affordable, and sustainable heat supply. The ambitious goals include fostering Europe's global leadership in renewable technologies, ensuring reliable energy supply for industries and households, and accelerating the integration of Carbon Capture, Utilization, and Storage with geothermal systems. To ensure the project's outcomes have a lasting impact, GEOFLEXheat will execute robust commercialization strategy, including the establishment of a spin-off company, extensive environmental and economic assessments, and the creation of a Social Acceptance Guide to facilitate policy influence and community engagement. Embracing a future where geothermal energy is a cornerstone of Europe's renewable energy mix, GEOFLEXheat is poised to become a catalyst for energy sustainability, economic growth and environmental stewardship.

Description:
Greet GEO will increase the capacity of regional innovation ecosystems, especially SMEs in certain less developed Central European (Pannonian Basin) regions and in selected outermost regions in a synergetic manner. It focuses on the utilization of geothermal resources with a holistic approach, with niche pilots in deep geothermal and shallow geothermal, in line with the specific domains and niches, and needs of the target regions. Its project consortium has seasoned thematic and territorial experts with complementary strengths and roles. They combine unique ecosystems, policies, finance, technical, training, communications and networking expertise. An outreach to over 10 less developed and outermost regions and over 20 key stakeholders is demonstrated. A combination of less developed and outermost territories with high geothermal (cooperation) potential and the leading European geothermal industry associations ensures a high impact

This project has received funding from the European Innovation Council and SMEs Executive Agency green research and innovation programme under gran agreement Nº1011180405

Name: MEGE (Menderes Geothermal A.Ş.)
Description:
Merkezi Aydın’da bulunan, Menderes Geothermal Elektrik Üretim A.Ş. 1999 yılında kurulmuştur. Salavatlı Jeotermal Sahası’nda jeotermal enerjiden, elektrik enerjisi üretimi amacıyla kurulan şirket; 4628 sayılı Elektrik Piyasası Kanunu çerçevesinde serbestleşen elektrik piyasasının elektrik enerjisi ihtiyacını karşılamakta olan bir yatırım firmasıdır.

“Türkiye’nin İlk Özel Sektör Jeotermal Enerji Santrali Yatırımı” olma özelliği ile MB Holding için bir onur kaynağı 7,95 MWe kapasiteli DORA-1 JES (Jeotermal Enerji Santrali) Mayıs 2006 tarihinde üretime başlamış ve tüm sektöre öncü olmuştur. DORA-1 JES tesisinin üretime alınmasına takiben jeotermal sahada sistematik şekilde sürekli rezervuar gözlemi yapılarak bugüne kadar kademeli olarak 4 adet daha jeotermal santral ünitesi devreye alınmıştır. DORA-2 JES 9,5 MWe – 2010, DORA-3A JES 17 MWe – 2013, DORA-3B JES 17 MWe – 2014, DORA-4 JES 17 MWe – 2016 toplamda net 68,5 MWe kurulu güç kapasitesine ulaşılmıştır.

Name: ORCHYD
Description:
Deep geothermal reservoirs are being targeted for renewable energy supply worldwide. However, while international research efforts are stepping up to the challenge of overcoming the low efficiency of heat recovery from depth to the surface, the showstopper remains the slow drilling speed provided by the conventional rotary system in deep hard rocks (> 4 km). Deep drilling requires long drilling times, often resulting in unacceptably high initial investment. ORCHYD’s new drilling technology will increase hard rock drilling rates from the current range of 1-2 m/h up to 4-10 m/h. The novelty is to combine two, previously separate, mature technologies: High Pressure Water Jetting (HPWJ) and Percussive Drilling, in a system customised for hard rock geothermal reservoirs to depths of 6 km. Planned experiments and solid-fluid coupled models designed to reveal the critical fragmentation mechanisms under in-situ stress conditions will be used to design, build and validate, with pilot drilling tests, the new system for field operations. 
The hybrid development requires optimisation of: i) release of high stress concentrations on the hole bottom while drilling, ii) slotting circumferential relieving grooves on the hole bottom using HPWJ (up to 200 MPa), iii) in-hole production of the HPWJ using a down-hole pressure intensifier activated by the drilling vibrations, hence damping out harmful drilling system vibrations and iv) an advanced down-hole percussive rotating mud hammer for drilling to derive the maximum benefit from the modified bottom-hole stress regime. ORCHYD will decrease the drilling cost by 65% in hard rock sections. This will result in 30% reduction of the total cost of deep geothermal well construction. In addition, the new coupled Intensifier-HPWJ-Hammer system has the potential to drill and steer multi-lateral wells which greatly increase thermal connectivity, are cheaper, use far less water and are more controllable than conventional fracking stimulations.

Name: Three and Three Consult Limited
Description:
Three and Three Consult Limited is primarily a Geoenergy and then a Geotourism firm that is registered and domiciled in Abuja, Nigeria. It is the first geothermal energy startup in West Africa founded in 2020. The firm's primary goal is to provide an alternative source of energy in baseload geothermal power, to bring to fruition the 2060 net-zero target of Africa's largest oil and gas producer.

Three and Three's general service portfolio include Geothermal R&D, Geoenergy advocacy via geo-themed tours and vacations, sustainable energy policy creation, etc. The firm has so far geophysically investigated Nigeria's flagship geothermal region (Ruwan-Zafi Hotspring region) and is currently investigating other potential areas to create a data bank for future Geothermal projects.

On realising possible reluctance of Nigeria as a whole towards a form of energy that spells doom to its main source of foreign exchange, and the gap between geotourism and the travel space in Nigeria; Three and Three Consult Limited decided to harness the touristic appeal of geothermal features to lobby customers - better dubbed as  investors/stakeholders - into the global fight against climate change. This is possible via organized geothermal-themed travel services in rare touristic destinations such as Iceland, New Zealand, Indonesia, etc; that in turn replaces the generic vacation trips of our elite clientele.

Three and Three ultimately looks to the future to become a major key player in the sustainable energy future of Nigeria by first taking advantage of geotourism as a cash-cow alongside external investments and funding.

We are currently looking to investment opportunities and partnerships, to grow and to meet our goals.

Name: PEAK Geothermal Energy Inc.
Description:
The renewable energy industry is currently one of the top investment opportunities globally, and there are only a few pure renewable energy plays in the market that have all of the benefits of geothermal energy. With abundant geothermal resources globally and a lack of world-class, baseload power projects, the geothermal energy industry is poised for significant growth.

At Peak, our mission is to accelerate the adoption of geothermal energy as a viable alternative to traditional fossil fuels. We aim to create a greener world by developing and operating geothermal power plants that harness the Earth’s heat to generate clean baseload electricity and heat for residential, commercial, and industrial applications.

Peak Geothermal Energy Inc. (PEAK) is a leading developer and provider of geothermal energy solutions, dedicated to harnessing the Earth’s renewable energy for a sustainable future. With our expertise and commitment to innovation, we are driving the transition to clean, reliable, and cost-effective energy sources.

Name: MST Drill
Description: Specjalizujemy w kompleksowym wykonywaniu instalacji systemów geotermalnych opartych na pionowych odwiertach pod dolne źródło gruntowych pomp ciepła – otworowych wymiennikach ciepła. W tym celu korzystamy z nowoczesnego urządzenia – wiertnicy pionowej firmy Beretta GT52 przystosowanej zarówno do wiercenia obrotowego na płuczkę jak i do metody DTH (młotka wgłębnego) co pozwala nam na przewiercenie się przez każdy rodzaj warstw geologicznych w celu uzyskania zamierzonego celu geologicznego. Zatrudniamy doświadczoną załogę, która oprócz lat pracy posiada wykształcenie wiertnicze nabyte na Akademii Górniczo-Hutniczej w Krakowie na Wydziale Wiertnictwa, Nafty i Gazu. Doświadczenie wraz z ciągłą chęcią rozwoju jest kluczem do poprawnego wykonania powierzonych nam zleceń zgodnie ze sztuką wiertniczą. Przyświeca nam dewiza nie ilość ale jakość.
